data.title: Dive Into Tides of Tomorrow: Narrative Adventure from Award-Winning Road 96 Creators Is Out Now
data.incipit: Home Press releases Dive Into Tides of Tomorrow: Narrative Adventure from Award-Winning Road 96 Creators Is Out...
data.body: Home Press releases Dive Into Tides of Tomorrow: Narrative Adventure from Award-Winning Road 96 Creators Is Out Now Press release 22/04/2026 Montpellier, France / Vienna, Austria - April 22nd, 2026: It’s time to embark on a unique journey – Tides of Tomorrow is out now on PC, PlayStation 5, and Xbox Series X|S. Developed by DigixArt in Montpellier, France, the creators of the critically acclaimed Road 96, this atmospheric narrative adventure invites players to shape the fate of a world teetering between destruction and renewal. Set in a plasticpunk world where humanity’s remnants cling to scattered islands and half-submerged cities, Tides of Tomorrow is a single-player journey where players are never truly alone. Through the Online Story-Link feature, they will constantly feel the presence of other Tidewalkers, choosing to follow or undo their in-game decisions. By choosing the Story-Link of a DigixArt team member, a favorite streamer, a friend, or even a total stranger, players embark on a mission shaped by the choices of another, while leaving their own lasting mark for future players. Whether they choose to help reconstruct the world or doom it, every path adds another layer to a world suffering from a disease that ravages all forms of life. Tides of Tomorrow | Release Trailer Download the assets: https://thqn.net/4cOsB6W Get the game now PlayStation: https://thqn.net/tot-psn Xbox: https://thqn.net/tot-xbox Steam: https://thqn.net/tot-steam Twitch Drops Campaign Starts Today Starting today, all Tidewalkers – and anyone interested in the game – should check out Twitch. Watch a Tides of Tomorrow stream on any participating channel for a total of 1 hour to receive the exclusive “Twitchwalker” skin. For those who want to dive deeper, a total watch time of 3 hours unlocks the “Mystery Trait” skin. Twitch Drops will be available until May 11th, 2026. Follow Tides of Tomorrow on Twitch to easily find all participating channels: https://thqn.net/4vI0NsD Sounds of Tomorrow To further immerse players in its evocative world, the original soundtrack of Tides of Tomorrow will be available at launch. The OST will be released digitally on Steam and on major streaming platforms, including Spotify, Apple Music, and Deezer. For collectors and music lovers, the soundtrack will also be available in physical formats, including a deluxe double CD edition and a vinyl edition, celebrating the game’s unique atmosphere. Links & Info Website: https://tidesoftomorrow.com Discord: https://t.co/CA92zvfUPe Tides of Tomorrow is developed by DigixArt and published by THQ Nordic. The game is available now for PC, PlayStation®5, and Xbox Series X|S at an SRP of €29.99 / $29.99. About THQ Nordic Our official boiler plate can be found on our website: THQ Nordic Website
